commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a plugin SDK paged action result helper, wires Discord thread-list responses to normalized pagination fields, updates SDK docs/tests, and includes approval-route/gateway auth changes.

PR surface: Source +635, Tests +844, Docs 0, Generated 0. Total +1479 across 23 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a traditional bug repro, but source inspection confirms current main only exposes the raw Discord `threads` result while the PR adds normalized pagination fields. The PR body includes real Discord empty-page proof; the `has_more: true` cursor path is covered by unit test rather than live data.

target.title: Expose paged channel action results
target.body:
## Summary

- Add a generic SDK helper for paged channel action results so list/read-style plugin actions can expose `complete`, `hasMore`, `returnedCount`, `source`, `query`, and optional cursor metadata without losing channel-specific payloads.
- Wire Discord `thread-list` through the helper, preserving the previous raw `threads` result while adding normalized `items` and pagination fields.
- Cover both the SDK helper and the Discord archived-thread `has_more` regression, and document the updated `channel-actions` SDK surface.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugin-sdk/channel-actions.test.ts extensions/discord/src/actions/runtime.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-subpaths.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-runtime-api-guardrails.test.ts`
- `node --max-old-space-size=8192 --import tsx scripts/generate-plugin-sdk-api-baseline.ts --check`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo`
- `git diff --check`

`tsconfig.extensions.json` was not fully green in the existing dirty worktree because of an unrelated local edit in `extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts` where `"internal-only payload"` is not assignable to `DiscordReplySkipReason`.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Discord thread-list actions no longer hide Discord pagination under the raw provider payload; agents now get explicit completion and cursor metadata while existing callers can still read the prior raw `threads` field.

Real environment tested: Wilfred's locally configured Discord bot in guild `1474893848617423062`, using read-only OpenClaw message actions with the local bundled Discord plugin override so the patched source plugin was exercised.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `OPENCLAW_DISABLE_PERSISTED_PLUGIN_REGISTRY=1 OPENCLAW_BUNDLED_PLUGINS_DIR=extensions OPENCLAW_TEST_TRUST_BUNDLED_PLUGINS_DIR=1 pnpm openclaw message thread list --channel discord --guild-id 1474893848617423062 --channel-id 1474979711258988735 --include-archived --limit 2 --json`

Evidence after fix: The local `projects` channel returned `items: []`, `complete: true`, `hasMore: false`, `returnedCount: 0`, `source: "discord.threadList.archived"`, and preserved the raw Discord-compatible `threads: { threads: [], members: [], has_more: false }` payload.

Observed result after fix: The active guild thread-list and archived `projects` thread-list both completed successfully through the Discord plugin and produced the normalized contract shape. A read-only sweep of local text channels found no archived threads, so live proof covers the compatible empty-page result; the unit test covers `has_more: true` and cursor propagation.

What was not tested: A live non-empty archived-thread page with `has_more: true`, because the local Discord server had no archived threads in the swept text channels and I did not create or post test data.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
